circular: Banks must maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 9%.
policy: The bank shall maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 9% at all times.
notes: Exact match in intent and threshold.

circular: All ATMs must be secured with physical locks and 24/7 CCTV monitoring.
policy: Each ATM location is equipped with physical barriers and round-the-clock video surveillance.
notes: Semantic match using different words.

circular: The Board shall review the IT security policy at least once a year.
policy: The Board of Directors is responsible for conducting an annual review of the IT security framework.
notes: Time constraint matches ('once a year' vs 'annual').

circular: Customer accounts with no transactions for 24 months must be classified as dormant.
policy: Accounts exhibiting zero transaction activity for a continuous period of two years will be flagged as dormant.
notes: 24 months = two years.

circular: Regulated entities must appoint a Chief Information Security Officer (CISO).
policy: The organization shall designate a CISO to oversee all information security operations.
notes: Direct alignment.

circular: Penetration testing of critical systems must be conducted annually.
policy: We perform comprehensive penetration tests on all core and critical systems every year.
notes: Annually = every year.

circular: Data at rest must be encrypted using AES-256 or equivalent strong encryption standards.
policy: All stored customer and financial data is encrypted employing the AES-256 standard.
notes: Specific standard match.

circular: Banks must provide an option for customers to instantly block their debit cards via mobile app.
policy: The mobile banking application includes a feature enabling users to immediately freeze or block their debit cards.
notes: Semantic similarity.

circular: A grievance redressal report must be submitted to the RBI within 15 days of the quarter-end.
policy: The compliance team shall file the quarterly grievance redressal report with the RBI no later than 15 days after the end of each quarter.
notes: Constraint and actor match.

circular: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory for all internal employee access to core banking systems.
policy: All staff must authenticate using MFA before accessing the core banking application.
notes: Clear match.

circular: Banks shall implement multi-factor authentication for all customer logins.
policy: The bank may consider implementing multi-factor authentication for customer logins if deemed necessary.
notes: Modality mismatch (shall/must vs may/consider). Present but weaker.

circular: The Board of Directors must review the risk policy quarterly.
policy: The risk management committee will review the risk policy annually.
notes: Mismatch in time constraint (quarterly vs annually). Coverage exists but is weaker.

circular: All critical incidents must be reported to CERT-In within 6 hours of identification.
policy: The IT team should report any severe cyber incidents to relevant authorities within 24 hours.
notes: Missing crucial 6-hour constraint. A 24h reporting window is entirely out of compliance with the 6h hard mandate.

circular: Customer consent is explicitly required before sharing data with third-party vendors.
policy: The bank shares data with trusted third-party vendors to improve services, subject to our general terms.
notes: Missing explicit consent mechanism component entirely.

circular: Banks must hold a capital conservation buffer of 2.5%.
policy: The bank aims to maintain a capital buffer of at least 1.5% to weather economic downturns.
notes: Threshold mismatch (2.5% vs 1.5%). Buffer exists, but insufficient.

circular: All employees must undergo anti-money laundering (AML) training annually.
policy: New hires will receive AML orientation during their onboarding process.
notes: Missing two distinct components: annual cadence and all-employees scope.

circular: Data backups must be stored in a geographically distinct disaster recovery site.
policy: Daily data backups are encrypted and stored in an off-site cloud storage bucket.
notes: Ambiguous if 'off-site cloud' meets 'geographically distinct DR site'. Partial coverage present.

circular: Banks must strictly limit exposure to a single borrower to 15% of capital funds.
policy: We generally restrict lending to a single corporate entity to around 20% of capital funds.
notes: Constraint mismatch (15% vs 20%) and weaker modality ('generally restrict'). Present but insufficient.

circular: ATMs must be upgraded to support EMV chip and PIN processing immediately.
policy: The ATM fleet is undergoing a phased upgrade to support EMV chips over the next 18 months.
notes: Time constraint mismatch (immediately vs 18 months). Upgrade in progress but insufficient timing.

circular: Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) must be filed within 7 days of arriving at a conclusion.
policy: The compliance officer will file STRs with the regulator promptly upon concluding an investigation.
notes: Ambiguous time constraint ('promptly' vs 'within 7 days'). Present but lacks precision.

circular: Banks must establish a dedicated whistle-blower mechanism for reporting fraud.
policy: Employees are encouraged to report any HR grievances to their direct managers.
notes: Completely missing whistle-blower/fraud mechanism.

circular: Regulated entities must conduct an independent audit of their IT systems every year.
policy: The marketing team will review vendor contracts annually.
notes: Unrelated domains (IT audit vs Marketing vendors).

circular: The bank shall not levy any penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balance in basic savings bank deposit accounts.
policy: A fee of INR 500 will be deducted monthly if the account balance falls below the minimum required amount.
notes: Direct contradiction.

circular: Banks must implement API security gateways for all open banking interfaces.
policy: The bank shall ensure physical security of all branch premises.
notes: Similar generic words ('security', 'bank') but entirely missing API/Open Banking clause.

circular: Foreign currency non-resident (FCNR) deposits must have a minimum maturity of 1 year.
policy: Domestic fixed deposits can be opened for a minimum duration of 7 days.
notes: Different subjects (FCNR vs Domestic).

circular: Positive Pay System must be implemented for all cheques of value ₹50,000 and above.
policy: Cheque books will be issued to current account holders free of charge.
notes: Topic is cheques, but entirely missing Positive Pay requirement.

circular: Card issuers must provide a one-time password (OTP) for all online domestic transactions.
policy: Credit cards will be dispatched to the customer's registered address within 3 working days.
notes: Topic is cards, but missing OTP requirement.

circular: Banks must strictly prohibit the use of corporate funds for speculative cryptocurrency trading.
policy: The investment committee will allocate surplus funds into government bonds and AAA-rated corporate debt.
notes: Missing explicit prohibition on crypto.

circular: Senior management compensation must include a malus/clawback clause for poor financial performance.
policy: Employees will receive an annual bonus based on their individual performance ratings.
notes: Missing clawback/malus for senior management.

circular: Branches must display the comprehensive notice board including ombudsman details at a prominent location.
policy: Branch managers are responsible for ensuring sufficient cash inventory in the vault.
notes: Unrelated operational branch directive.
